name: UBA : User Failed to be Added to Role
notes: Detects when adding a user to a role fails in MS Exchange.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event QID is one of the following (101250207) Add RoleGroupMember Failed, (101250844) Update RoleGroupMember Failed
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Failed to be Added to Role on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event QID is one of the following (101250207) Add RoleGroupMember Failed, (101250844) Update RoleGroupMember Failed
RED_list: Event name: UBA : User Failed to be Added to Role
